seo.title: Kitipong Sarahjan | Flutter Developer
seo.description: Portfolio website built with Flutter Web

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I have over 20 years of experience in the software industry, specifically focusing on mobile device software since the PDA era with platforms like Palm and Pocket PC.
Evolving into the smartphone era, I transitioned from Java Phone and Symbian to current modern platforms like Android and iOS.
I am highly proficient in programming with C, C++, Java, and Dart (Flutter), and possess practical working knowledge of Python, JavaScript, Objective-C, and SQL.
I have extensive experience spanning the entire Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).
I am a strong team player, capable of problem-solving under pressure to ensure successful project delivery.
I have remote work experience collaborating with international teams across different time zones, particularly in Europe and the United States.
I am experienced in integrating applications with modern backends including Firebase, GraphQL, and REST APIs.
I have full capability in deploying and publishing applications to both Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
I am a fast learner when it comes to new technologies and can effectively apply them to practical workloads.

featuredProjects.name: WeLink Application set
featuredProjects.summary: WeLink is an application platform connecting people together.
featuredProjects.longDescription: WeLink is a multi-purpose application that features ride-hailing, food delivery, services, merchants, restaurants, and event ticketing. Additionally, it consists of dedicated applications for merchants/restaurants and riders.
